movie.title: 40 Acres (2025) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & ENG] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Hailey Freeman and her family are the last descendants of African American farmers who settled in rural Canada after the Civil War. In a famine-decimated near future, they now struggle to safeguard their farm, as they make one last stand against a vicious militia hell-bent on taking their 40 Acres.
